name: carboniq-monorepo
description: CarbonIQ AI - Digital Carbon Twin for Personal Sustainability

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.test: npm test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm run test && npm run build
